agent_roster.focus: Mustard X, gaps, options agreement, panel expectancy, and whether a hypothesized edge is actually money-relevant.
agent_roster.label: Quant Edge Agent

agent_roster.focus: Orders, fills, giveback, sizing, stops, stale fires, permission leaks, and anything that can turn good theory into bad P/L.
agent_roster.label: Execution Risk Agent

agent_roster.focus: Panel to pick to decision to order to fill to exit to realized result to panel score integrity.

agent_roster.label: Auction + Options Agent

advisory_actions: Sample Mustard Runner, Surge Micro, and clear-highway agreement only through the formal experiment path.
Treat negative-edge experiment panels as review candidates, not live policy candidates.
Do not promote or score any ghost-heavy edge while certification is rejected and forward realized evidence is thin.
findings: Edge is not promotion-quality today: daily certification is REJECTED, promotion_gate is FAIL, and AI learning cannot affect the bot or normal scores.

The strongest apparent saved-money evidence is stale: gate_effectiveness is dated 2026-07-01 and reports 954 graded blocked candidates, avg_result_r=-0.1441, total_result_r=-137.4382, and win_rate=35.85.
Route-lock blocks on gap_reject_short and live_fire_dump look protective in stale evidence at about -0.345R average across roughly 452-453 graded samples.
Live realized evidence is thin: panel_score reports actual_trades=3, actual_closed=1, and actual_realized_pnl=12.3.
Mustard Runner, Surge Micro, and options/gap clear-highway agreement deserve more clean forward samples, but only inside admitted research/shadow interpretation.

surge_watch_probe, live_fire_dump, live_fire_surge, surge_chase, and gap_wall_roundtrip_shadow deserve tightening/deletion review because packet edge_r values are negative or unsupported by clean forward evidence.

Mustard and gap/options are mostly context today: mustard_forward has 40 candidates, 3 entered, 0 graded, avg_max_favorable_r=0.0026, and no realized R; gap_options has 701 traces but only 37 fully checked.
agent_reviews.label: Quant Edge Agent

advisory_actions: Watch for route/permission intent diverging from actual live enforcement flags.
Do not over-trust live conformance until order and fill checks populate.
Verify end-of-day flattening separately because the packet shows 5 positions and 10 open orders intraday.
findings: Broker reconcile is clean but not flat at packet time: broker_connected=true, open_orders=10, positions=5, order_fail=0, position_fail=0, orphan_exit_orders=0, and unprotected_positions=0.
Live gate conformance is thin: orders_checked=0, fills_checked=0, execution_truth_closed=0, and execution_truth_realized_pnl=0 despite broker open orders/positions.

Permission/enforcement mismatch is the top execution watch: active_entry_enforcement=false, route_lock_enforce=false, trade_permission_enforce=false, and legacy_trade_permission_enforce=false while structural gates report present.
STALE_FIRE remains money-relevant: gate_effectiveness lists STALE_FIRE=229, one of the largest blocked groups, though the ledger is stale.
Giveback evidence is weak for this session: guard_kind=WATCHING, guard_entry_permission=ALLOW_NEW_ENTRIES, guard_triggered=false, graded=0, and the source is dated 2026-07-01.
Visible Mustard execution rows remain ungraded or pending; ABEO is open/ungraded with realized_r=null.
agent_reviews.label: Execution Risk Agent

advisory_actions: Treat all promotion and panel edge output as research-only until a fresh daily certification passes.
Reconcile panel_score, live_gate_conformance, gap/options actuals, and Mustard forward before using PnL as contract evidence.
Keep experiment edge_r and actual trade counts quarantined in operator views.
findings: Daily certification is REJECTED/FAIL; operator_read says critical registry/score/order contract breaches are present.
Promotion gate is FAIL: 25 strategies are blocked, certification_allows_promotion=false, promotion_review_allowed=0, demotion_review_allowed=0, forward_order_breaches=0, and normal_partition_leaks=0.

Health is FAIL with stale RTH checks for contract dashboard, breach ledger, panel score ledger, accountability queue, panel registry, fill reconcile, exit reconcile, ghost ledger, trade permissions, route readiness, and decision obligation.

Panel-to-realized truth is not aligned enough for money conclusions: panel_score reports actual_closed=1 and actual_realized_pnl=12.3, gap/options reports actual_fills=2 and actual_trades=3, mustard_forward has entered=3 but graded=0, and live_gate_conformance checked zero orders/fills.
AI learning is correctly quarantined: can_affect_bot=false, can_affect_scores=false, certified_normal_source=false, and all 13 hypotheses need experiment admission.
No normal score partition leak is reported, but experiment edge_r and actual_trades still need to stay visibly quarantined from normal scoring.
agent_reviews.label: Contract Spine Agent

advisory_actions: Separate clear-highway examples from NO_MAPS and unknown buckets in the next human review.
Watch PBF, ABEO, TENB, PSNL, and RLAY as examples, not promotion evidence.
Keep the bottom-channel gap-highway and options-clear-highway hypotheses in shadow sample-building only.
findings: Auction/options agreement exists in spots, but coverage is too incomplete and stale for promotion-grade conclusions.
Gap lineage is the main missing auction input: only 37/701 traces are fully checked, 444/701 are NO_MAPS, and 447/701 have gaps_missing.
Options coverage is also weak: options_missing=389 and options_stale/options_not_fresh=272.
The packet exposes channel thesis mostly at hypothesis level, not enough per-row channel location detail to certify the bottom-channel gap-highway thesis.

Visible supportive clear examples include PBF and ABEO; TENB has clear highway but mixed option tone; PSNL has clear highway but put wall does not support the parent; RLAY is a caution row with exhausted parent and mixed/weak options.
Call walls are before 2R/3R on checked rows but not before target, so fixed-target reads look cleaner than runner reads.
top_agreements and top_conflicts are empty even though agreement_counts show 32 clear agreements and 2 gap-clear/options-block conflicts.
agent_reviews.label: Auction + Options Agent

llm_call.confidence: MEDIUM_HIGH: high confidence on packet facts and safety posture; medium confidence on root causes because stale sources, thin execution truth, and missing dedicated trust-executor/auction-shadow evidence limit diagnosis. Advisory only; no live behavior changes.
do_not_change_yet: Do not change bot configuration, route policy, trade permissions, order logic, live trading behavior, panel scores, score weights, gates, registry phases, sizing, stops, or promotion status from this review.
Do not blend AI learning, Mustard, gap/options, auction, or any research-note evidence into normal score partitions.
Do not loosen route locks, permission controls, daily PnL guard, source freshness guard, stale-fire protection, or core execution guards based on this packet.

Do not promote Mustard Runner, Mustard Grind, Mustard Mixed Research, Surge Micro, options/gap clear-highway agreement, bottom-channel gap-highway logic, or live-fire routes from ungraded or stale evidence.
Do not treat ghost-heavy edge, max_favorable_r, clear-highway context, or experiment edge_r values as realized expectancy while certification is rejected and execution truth remains thin.
Do not make live changes to address route_lock_enforce or trade_permission_enforce flags from this advisory review; escalate them as observation/audit items only.
money_risks: False confidence from ghost-heavy edge statistics while daily certification is rejected.
Contract freshness risk from health FAIL and stale RTH artifacts during the session.
Execution-truth gap: panel_score, gap/options actuals, mustard_forward, broker_reconcile, and live_gate_conformance do not yet form one aligned order/fill/exit/realized chain.
Broker exposure watch: 10 open orders and 5 protected positions appeared intraday, so flat-by-end-of-day discipline must be verified outside this advisory review.
Permission/enforcement drift risk from active_entry_enforcement=false, route_lock_enforce=false, trade_permission_enforce=false, and legacy_trade_permission_enforce=false.
Stale-fire risk because STALE_FIRE=229 is large in old gate evidence and stale signals can damage scalp PnL if not contained.
Research contamination risk from ungraded Mustard entries, incomplete gap/options maps, and experiment edge_r values looking stronger than realized forward evidence.
Stale ledger risk because gate_effectiveness and giveback are dated 2026-07-01.
Map-context risk because most gap/options traces are NO_MAPS, gaps_missing, options_missing, or options stale/not fresh.
open_questions: Which specific registry, score, or order contract breaches caused daily certification rejection?
Why are contract health RTH sources stale, and are the underlying jobs paused, failed, or intentionally low-cadence?
Is the panel_score versus live_gate_conformance PnL mismatch a timing/modeling difference or a reconciliation gap?
Why does broker_reconcile show 10 open orders and 5 positions while live_gate_conformance checked zero orders and fills?
Are route_lock_enforce=false and trade_permission_enforce=false expected because of current architecture, or are they contract drift?
Are Mustard entered records track-only synthetic entries or broker-routed/live-related records?
Why does mustard_forward summary show 40 candidates and 3 entered while the embedded visible sample is smaller and mostly pending?
Why are gate_effectiveness and giveback still dated 2026-07-01?
Why are top_agreements and top_conflicts empty when gap/options summary reports clear agreements and conflicts?
Where should trust-executor and auction-shadow evidence surface if they are expected to support live execution review?
priority_actions: Advisory only: reconcile panel_score actual_trades=3, actual_closed=1, actual_realized_pnl=12.3 against live_gate_conformance execution_truth_closed=0, execution_truth_realized_pnl=0, orders_checked=0, and fills_checked=0 before trusting PnL-derived edge.
Advisory only: keep daily certification and health freshness as the first review gate; do not reason from promotion candidates while certification is REJECTED and health is FAIL.

Advisory only: watch the enforcement mismatch fields active_entry_enforcement=false, route_lock_enforce=false, trade_permission_enforce=false, and legacy_trade_permission_enforce=false without changing live policy from this review.
Advisory only: treat Mustard forward, gap/options agreement, and auction-highway reads as sample-building research until candidates close with graded realized_r and map coverage improves.
Advisory only: refresh or explicitly label stale gate_effectiveness and giveback ledgers before using them for saved-money, stale-fire, or strangled-opportunity conclusions.

Advisory only: verify end-of-day flattening controls separately because the intraday broker snapshot showed 5 positions and 10 open orders, even though no orphan or unprotected-position breach appeared.
llm_call.synthesis: The money-relevant read is contract-first caution. The 2026-07-15 packet was generated at 2026-07-15T10:47:46-04:00 with daily certification REJECTED, contract health FAIL from stale RTH sources, promotion_gate FAIL, and AI learning explicitly research-only. Broker reconcile is clean but shows 10 open orders and 5 protected positions intraday, while live conformance checked zero orders and fills. Mustard, gap/options, auction, and AI hypotheses remain useful research context, not deployable edge.
watch_next_session: Whether daily certification moves from REJECTED/FAIL to an accepted state and promotion_gate refreshes near packet generation time.
Whether contract health stale RTH checks clear, especially panel score, fill reconcile, exit reconcile, ghost ledger, trade permissions, route readiness, and decision obligation.
Whether panel_score PnL/trade counts reconcile with live_gate_conformance execution truth and broker reconcile.
Whether live_gate_conformance begins checking nonzero orders_checked and fills_checked while broker reconcile remains clean.
Whether the system is flat by end of day after the intraday packet showed 5 positions and 10 open orders.
Whether Mustard forward candidates close and become graded realized_r evidence, especially AGREE versus CONFLICT versus GAPS MISSING cohorts.
Whether gap/options NO_MAPS, gaps_missing, options_missing, and options_stale/not_fresh counts fall materially.
Whether PBF, ABEO, TENB, PSNL, and RLAY examples validate or fail in forward outcome tracking.
Whether gate_effectiveness and giveback ledgers refresh from their 2026-07-01 timestamps.
Whether trust-executor and dedicated auction-shadow evidence appear in future packets if expected to support live execution review.

top_queue.kill_criteria: Retire if runner opportunity lost exceeds protected drawdown after 30 closed trades.
